name: @jeldon/drafting
description: Domain-agnostic article drafting + editor-chat orchestration. The score->verify->one-shot-fix-pass draft loop (NDJSON events), getSiteKnowledge() prompt injection (pack.voice + priority keywords + voice memory), a VoiceMemory store (@jeldon/store), and the agentic citation-verifying chatEdit. Every prompt string is built from the Domain Pack's voice block; nothing about any vertical is hardcoded. Ported from Body of Health author.ts + chat.ts + site-knowledge.ts + voice-memory.ts + priority-keywords.ts.
